# Operator-A3 — Backup-Restore Verification Notes

## Summary

Coverage for Operator-A3 extended to schedule alignment; trace-attribute completeness is queued for the next cycle.

## Findings

- Org-East confirmed alignment on ingest pipelines; tracked for next cadence review.

- post-deployment review cadence drift was bounded within tolerance; escalated to the cadence council.

## Cadence

Cadence review is scheduled at the standard Operator-A3 interval; the next session lands on the same week as the Org-East cadence council.

## Notes

All findings are synthetic and authored solely as fixtures for the agent-runtime-observability demo corpus.
